purpose: Brand content for Hajj/Umrah season. Spiritual, humble, hospitality-focused. F&B and retail brands near Makkah/Madinah regions.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

brand_product.description: Brand product or hospitality offering to feature

prompt_template: Warm hospitality photography for {brand_product} in context of Saudi religious season — clean white and gold palette, dates and zamzam water symbolism where appropriate, no promotional pricing overlay, authentic Saudi hospitality atmosphere, halal certification visible if food, modest framing, warm natural light {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid: promotional pricing during Hajj season
Avoid: celebrity endorsement in Hajj context
Avoid in output: explicit religious imagery without brand permission
notes: Intents: defend, grow. Saudi adaptation guidance: Hajj season is the highest-sensitivity content window in the Saudi calendar. Brands near Makkah/Madinah regions use hospitality messaging — generosity, welcome, service. White and gold palette reflects Ihram and sacred space aesthetic. Dates and zamzam are universally appropriate symbols. Avoid any pricing or discount language — hospitality framing only. Compliance level: elevated — requires human review before publishing.
